language_selected: ✅ Your language has been set successfully!
welcome:
👋 Welcome to the Language Learning Bot!

Go to main menu:
no_more_steps: 🎉 Congratulations! You have completed all steps!
step_locked: 🔒 This step is locked. Please pass the previous step's exam first.
exam_start:
📝 Exam Step {step_num}

Please answer the questions:
exam_passed:
🎉 Congratulations! You passed this exam!

The next step has been unlocked for you.
exam_failed:
❌ Unfortunately, you did not pass this exam.

Please try again.
no_exam: ⚠️ No exam is defined for this step.
exam_already_passed: ✅ You have already taken the exam for this stage.
progress_no_steps: You haven't completed any steps yet.
progress_all_completed: 🎉 Congratulations! You have successfully completed all steps!
admin_only: ⚠️ This command is only for administrators.
upload_file: Please upload the file (video, audio, PDF or image):
select_step_for_exam: Please select a step for exam management:
enter_options: Please enter the options line by line (minimum 2 options):
enter_correct_option: Please enter the correct option number (numbering starts at 1):
error_occurred: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
no_steps_available: ⚠️ No steps are currently available. Please try again later.
confirm_delete_step: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete this step?
enter_title_fa: Please enter the title in Farsi:
enter_title_de: Please enter the title in German:
enter_description_fa: Please enter the description in Farsi:
enter_description_de: Please enter the description in German:
enter_question_fa: Please enter the question text in Farsi:
enter_question_de: Please enter the question text in German:
invalid_name: ⚠️ The entered name is invalid. Please enter a name with at least 2 characters.
invalid_mobile: ⚠️ The entered mobile number is invalid. Please enter a valid mobile number.
name: Name
edit_user_menu:
✏️ Edit User

Please select the field you want to edit:
enter_new_mobile: Please enter the new mobile number:
confirm_delete_user: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete user {name}?
add_another_step_prompt: Would you like to add another step?
sections_menu:
📚 Learning Sections

Please select a section:
no_sections_available: ⚠️ No sections are currently available. Please try again later.
section_lessons_title: 📖 Lessons in Section: {section_title} Please select a lesson:
no_lessons_available: ⚠️ No lessons are currently available in this section.
section_locked: 🔒 This section is locked. Please complete previous sections.
section_locked_message:
🔒 This section is locked.

To unlock this section, you must complete all lessons in the previous section.
lesson_locked: 🔒 This lesson is locked. Please complete previous lessons.
lesson_locked_message:
🔒 This lesson is locked.

To unlock this lesson, you must complete previous lessons.
next_lesson_unlocked: Next lesson has been unlocked for you!
next_section_unlocked: Next section has been unlocked for you!
confirm_delete_section: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete section «{title}»?
select_section_for_lesson: Please select a section to add a lesson to:
select_step_for_lesson: Please select a step to add to section «{section_title}»:
lesson_already_exists: ⚠️ This step has already been added to this section.
all_steps_added: ⚠️ All steps have been added to this section.
